  • Uses of RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components

    Fields in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components declared as RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    protected final RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    AbstractPluginComponent.initialRC
    Service class to register with on AbstractPluginComponent.execute(); null means "do not auto-register, the subclass will register manually inside AbstractPluginComponent.scenarioExecute()".
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.base.components with parameters of type RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    Broker.modifyServiceClass(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe de service d'un client déjà enregistré (upgrade STANDARD/PREMIUM ou downgrade vers FREE).
    void
    Client.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Demande au broker un changement de classe de service.
    void
    FullClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe d'enregistrement (FREE ↔ STANDARD ↔ PREMIUM).
    void
    PluginClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Demande au broker un changement de classe de service (upgrade ou downgrade vers FREE).
    void
    PrivilegedClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe d'enregistrement du client (FREE ↔ STANDARD ↔ PREMIUM).
    void
    PublisherClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe d'enregistrement (FREE ↔ STANDARD ↔ PREMIUM).
    void
    SubscriberClient.modifyServiceClass(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Modifie la classe d'enregistrement (FREE ↔ STANDARD ↔ PREMIUM).
    String
    Broker.register(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Enregistre un nouveau client avec sa classe de service initiale.
    void
    Client.register(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Enregistre ce client auprès du broker dans la classe de service rc.
    void
    PluginClient.register(RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    Enregistre ce client auprès du broker dans la classe de service rc.
    boolean
    Broker.registered(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    CDC §3.4 contract: returns true iff the client identified by receptionPortURI is currently registered and registered under the requested service class rc.

  • Uses of RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces

    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces that return RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass[]
    RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    Methods in fr.sorbonne_u.cps.pubsub.interfaces with parameters of type RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    RegistrationCI.modifyServiceClass(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    upgrade or degrade the registration to the class rc, returning a new URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI.
    String
    RegistrationCI.register(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    register on the publication/subscription system passing the URI of the inbound port offering the component interface ReceivingCI on which the user component will receive its messages; the method returns an URI of an inbound port offering the component interface PublishingCI on which the user component will publish its messages.
    boolean
    RegistrationCI.registered(String receptionPortURI, RegistrationCI.RegistrationClass rc)
    return true if receptionPortURI has already been registered with service class rc, otherwise false.

    Modifier and Type
    Method

Bogdan Styn, Setbel Mélissa — Sorbonne Université, 2026
